## 8. PUBLISHING STATUS

### Upload checklist (do this for each video)
- [ ] Create YouTube channel (studio.youtube.com)
- [ ] Upload channel icon and banner
- [ ] Paste channel description (all in `*_launch/channel_copy.md`)
- [ ] Upload video file
- [ ] Add title, description, tags (all in script JSON `youtube_title`, `youtube_description`)
- [ ] Add thumbnail (placeholder until Higgsfield)
- [ ] Set audience: "Yes, this is made for kids" (LO, ML) / "No" (GG)
- [ ] Add to playlist
- [ ] Set as channel trailer (EP001 only)
- [ ] Schedule or publish

### Per-episode publish readiness
| Episode | File Ready | Title Ready | Description Ready | Tags Ready | Thumbnail | Ready? |

## 10. REVENUE PROJECTIONS

### Conservative model (based on CPM benchmarks)

#### Little Olympus
| Milestone | Subscribers | Monthly Views | Est. CPM | Monthly Revenue |
|-----------|-------------|---------------|----------|-----------------|
| Launch | 0 | 0 | — | $0 |
| Month 3 | 500 | 15K | $3 | $45 |
| Month 6 | 5K | 150K | $4 | $600 |
| Month 12 | 25K | 750K | $5 | $3,750 |
| Month 18 | 100K | 3M | $5 | $15,000 |
| Year 3 | 500K+ | 15M+ | $6 | $90,000+/mo |

#### Mech Legends
| Milestone | Subscribers | Monthly Views | Est. CPM | Monthly Revenue |
|-----------|-------------|---------------|----------|-----------------|
| Month 6 | 8K | 250K | $3.50 | $875 |
| Month 12 | 40K | 1.2M | $4 | $4,800 |
| Month 18 | 150K | 4.5M | $4.50 | $20,250 |

#### Gods & Glory
| Milestone | Subscribers | Monthly Views | Est. CPM | Monthly Revenue |
|-----------|-------------|---------------|----------|-----------------|
| Month 6 | 3K | 60K | $8 | $480 |
| Month 12 | 15K | 300K | $10 | $3,000 |
| Month 18 | 50K | 1M | $12 | $12,000 |

### Combined portfolio projection
| Timeframe | Total Monthly Revenue | Notes |
|-----------|----------------------|-------|
| Month 6 | ~$2K | AdSense only |
| Month 12 | ~$12K | AdSense + first brand deals |
| Month 18 | ~$50K | AdSense + brand deals + early merch |
| Year 3 | ~$150K+ | Full portfolio + licensing |
| Year 5 | IP acquisition potential | Mech Legends toy deal: $50M–$500M exit |

### Key accelerators
- Hitting one viral video (>1M views) compresses all timelines by 6–12 months
- Real character art (Higgsfield) → higher click-through rate → faster growth
- ElevenLabs voiceover → watch time increase → better algorithm performance
- Consistent 1/week cadence is the single most important factor
